nasb.text: Your southern sector shall extend from the wilderness of Zin along the side of Edom, and your southern border shall extend from the end of the Salt Sea eastward.

esv.text: your south side shall be from the wilderness of Zin alongside Edom, and your southern border shall run from the end of the Salt Sea on the east.

cnv.text: 你們南面的地區要從尋的曠野，貼著以東邊界；你們的南界要從鹽海東面的盡頭起；

ccb.text: “南部疆界从荀旷野沿着以东边界延伸，东起死海的尽头，
